Story Name: Implement automated SOX control testing framework
Description: Build a framework that runs configurable control tests nightly against the financial close system, capturing pass/fail evidence and routing exceptions to the audit queue. AC: 100% of in-scope controls covered, evidence retained 7 years, exceptions routed within 4h.

Story Name: Build SOX control evidence collection service
Description: Service that pulls evidence artifacts (logs, screenshots, query results) on demand for any control test execution. Must support tamper-evident storage and signed audit URLs for regulators.

Story Name: Fix SOX control gap in quarterly reconciliation report
Description: Bug: quarterly reconciliation between general ledger and sub-ledgers misses 0.3% of intercompany transactions. Root cause appears to be a timezone offset in the close cutoff. AC: variance reduced to <0.001%.

Story Name: Create immutable audit log for all financial transactions
Description: Append-only audit log with cryptographic chain integrity covering every financial transaction routed through the close pipeline. AC: WORM storage, 7-year retention, regulator-facing search API <2s p95.

Story Name: Build audit trail search and export for regulators
Description: Self-service search UI plus bulk export endpoint for regulator-led inquiries. AC: search returns within 2s p95, exports include cryptographic chain proofs.

Story Name: Implement consent capture and versioning API
Description: REST API to capture user consent at signup and any subsequent re-consent prompts, with full versioning and replay history. AC: every consent event timestamped, replay returns historical state at any point in time.

Story Name: Build consent withdrawal workflow and notification
Description: User-facing flow + backend orchestration for consent withdrawal, including downstream system notifications and erasure scheduling.

Story Name: Implement right-to-erasure data deletion pipeline
Description: Asynchronous pipeline to action data subject erasure requests across primary stores, derived marts, search indexes, and backup snapshots within the regulated 30-day window.

Story Name: Build deletion verification and audit report
Description: Generate per-request audit report confirming erasure completion across every downstream system, signed and retained for regulatory inspection.

Story Name: Set up AWS Control Tower with guardrails
Description: Provision Control Tower account hierarchy with guardrails for IAM, encryption, and network egress. AC: all org-wide guardrails active, drift alerts wired into Slack on-call.

Story Name: Configure VPC architecture with private subnets
Description: VPC topology with public/private subnet separation per environment, transit gateway for inter-account routing, and security group baselines.

Story Name: Implement IAM roles and permission boundaries
Description: Standard IAM role library with permission boundaries that prevent lateral privilege escalation; rolled out to all new accounts via SCP.

Story Name: Migrate Jenkins pipelines to GitHub Actions
Description: Convert legacy Jenkins job definitions to GitHub Actions workflows with equivalent triggers, secrets, and notification rules.

Story Name: Set up ArgoCD for Kubernetes deployments
Description: ArgoCD instance with GitOps-style declarative deployment for all production K8s clusters; PR-based promotion path.

Story Name: Build deployment approval gates for production
Description: Manual approval step + change-record linkage required for prod-bound rollouts; integrates with the change management system.

Story Name: Standardize Grafana dashboard templates across all teams
Description: Publish a templated Grafana dashboard library with USE/RED metrics for service ownership, plus runbook and on-call links.

Story Name: Create runbook links within alert dashboards
Description: Auto-link Grafana alerts to the runbook URL of the owning team, reducing on-call MTTR.

Story Name: Deploy Elasticsearch cluster for centralized logging
Description: Stand up an Elasticsearch cluster with separate hot/warm tiers and ILM policies for log retention.

Story Name: Configure log retention policies and archival
Description: ILM policy that retains hot logs 14 days, warm 90 days, then archives to S3 Glacier for 7 years.

Story Name: Fix missing log entries from payment service
Description: Bug: 0.5% of payment service logs are dropped at high throughput. Likely a buffer-overflow in the agent. AC: zero drops at 10× peak load.

Story Name: Implement token bucket rate limiting at API gateway
Description: Token bucket with per-client refill rate; configurable via control plane.

Story Name: Build per-client quota management dashboard
Description: Self-service dashboard for clients to see their current quota, usage, and recent throttle events.

Story Name: Build developer portal with OpenAPI spec browser
Description: Developer portal serving versioned OpenAPI specs with try-it-now, code samples, and changelog.

Story Name: Integrate API changelog and versioning into portal
Description: Wire the spec versioning + changelog feed into the developer portal so users can see breaking changes per release.

Story Name: Story with no parent feature listed
Description: Test fixture: this story has no Feature Name set — should be flagged as an orphan and excluded from AI analysis.

Story Name: Story pointing to a feature that does not exist
Description: Test fixture: this story references a Feature Name not present in the features file — should be flagged as an orphan.

Story Name: Crawl payment-card data stores and tag PCI scope
Description: Run a discovery crawler across all data stores to identify card-holder data and tag in-scope rows for the PCI audit.

Story Name: Generate quarterly PCI compliance attestation report
Description: Automated report that summarizes scope, findings, and remediation status for the quarterly PCI attestation.

Story Name: Migrate batch jobs from on-prem to AWS Batch
Description: Move 200 nightly batch jobs from on-prem cron servers to AWS Batch with equivalent SLAs.

Story Name: Apply Q4 critical kernel patches to fleet
Description: Coordinated rolling patch of CVE-2025-XXXX across the legacy server fleet.

Story Name: Train sentiment classifier on 12-month support tickets
Description: Train and validate a binary sentiment classifier on a 12-month rolling window of support tickets and CSAT comments.
